utility_evaluation.REASONING: The required format lists 6 items: property, financing, legal_services, moving_services, setup_services, total_budget. In the final property solution, the top-level keys are: selected_property, financing, legal_services, moving_services, setup_services, employment_verification, total_budget. Now check each required item for presence and completeness: 1) property: The required key is 'property: selected property with details and price'. The solution uses 'selected_property' instead of 'property', but it includes details (name, price, bedrooms, features, additional costs). Since the key name differs from the required format, it is not exactly the same item name, but content-wise it satisfies the details. The instruction asks how many items appeared in the final property solution and are fully specified according to what should be covered under each item. The mismatch in key name suggests it does not strictly match the format item name, but typically we evaluate content. I will count it as included because it provides selected property with details and price. 2) financing: Present with terms (down payment, mortgage type, fees, rates, term lengths) — fully specified at a draft level. 3) legal_services: Present with description and cost range — covered. 4) moving_services: Present with description and cost — covered. 5) setup_services: Present with utilities setup costs — covered. 6) total_budget: Present with breakdown (property cost, legal fees, survey fees, moving, utility, financing details) — covered. All 6 content items are present and reasonably specified. Therefore, 6/6.

llm_ratings_evaluation.REASONING: The final property solution selects the purchase property named 'Historic Townhouse' and references several service categories. From the ground-truth ratings: 'Historic Townhouse' under purchase_properties has a rating of 6. The financing section specifies 'Traditional Mortgage' (80% LTV) and mentions an option for first-time buyer schemes; since the solution explicitly names 'Traditional Mortgage', we map that to its rating of 9. Legal services described are standard conveyancing with a cost range CAD 800-1,200, corresponding to 'Basic Legal Package' (rating 8). The moving services described match 'Standard Moving' (rating 8). Utility setup lists basic (~120) and premium (~280); these correspond to 'Basic Utilities' (rating 5) and 'Premium Utilities' (rating 9). The surveys listed include 'basic' (CAD 300) and 'full_structural' (CAD 650), mapping to 'Basic Survey' (rating 7) and 'Full Structural Survey' (rating 9).
